shopifixer.positioning: Diagnose and fix Shopify conversion and development issues.
shopifixer.boundary: Do not sell Abando in first-touch ShopiFixer outreach.

abando.positioning: Automated revenue recovery and customer re-engagement for Shopify merchants.
abando.initial_wedge: Checkout/cart recovery through email and SMS.
abando.boundary: Do not position Abando as the ShopiFixer audit or service.
